title: Zhuangzi, Chapter 32: Lie Yukou
description: Chapter 32 of the Zhuangzi — the Taoist masterpiece of paradox and parable.
introduction: Chapter 32 of the Zhuangzi — the Taoist masterpiece of paradox and parable.

translation.text: Lie Yukou set off for Qi, but halfway there he turned around and came back. He happened to meet Bohun Wuren. 'What made you turn around and come back?' asked Bohun Wuren. 'I was alarmed.' 'Why were you alarmed?' 'I stopped to eat at ten soup-shops along the way, and at five of them they served me soup before I'd even paid for it!'
